sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna hong phel na’ng kaki ko a;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua lai ah sisan in hong sawp ta,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh’n nuam tak-in hong om pih hi;
Tua sing lamteh ah kei hong sam hi,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawh sawp siang na tui nak manpha a,
Ka tun man in kei ka nuam lua
Jesuh’n hong hon hong siang sak zo ta,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh khe phungah hong ki-ap un;
Ki bual un-la, kisawp siang sak
